posts.author: Kevke (Kevin Binder)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi guys,
i am looking for a solution how i can automated create an excel file based on a draft when i create a new item. I mean I create an item with some keypoints like investment cost, size, possible income,… and these keypoints are automatically transfered to the excel draft, so that i get a column in my dashboard with this excel file. Any idea how I can do this?
Thanks in advance!
